title: D-Top Table With or Without Modesty
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.manufacturer: Global Furniture Group (Offices to Go / Newland)
specs.materials: Thermally fused laminate top; metal legs
key_features: D-shaped top profile suited for meeting rooms and boardroom configurations
Optional 3/4" laminate modesty panel for under-desk privacy
Metal leg base for commercial-grade stability
Available with or without modesty panel
specs.notes: Generic BBI listing titled 'D-Top Table With or Without Modesty' — a D-Top typically refers to a D-shaped (bullet/half-round) end table or conference/boardroom end with an optional modesty panel. Searches on Global Furniture Group, OTG/Offices to Go, and BBI's own site did not surface a specific matching SKU. The BBI collection page shows related items like 'U-Shape D-Top Workstation' but no standalone 'D-Top Table' product page with brand/model was retrievable. Need access to the actual BBI product page or BBI's internal catalog to identify the manufacturer and model code before specs can be populated.
specs.who_its_for: Boardroom end configurations, school staff meeting rooms, and municipal council ante-chambers where a D-shaped table adds a curved anchor piece to a rectangular conference layout.
